name: hook-example-posttooluse
description: Single-event reference hook for PostToolUse, scoped to Write|Edit. After the tool completes, appends a timestamped marker plus the full hook JSON payload (read from stdin) to /tmp/hook-fired-posttooluse.log. The payload carries the tool name, input, and response — read it from stdin JSON, NOT from a CLAUDE_TOOL_NAME env var (which is not populated).
